projects.title: Flowy
projects.description: Real-time workforce management used across multiple Amazon departments. 24-hour shift planning, live WebSocket updates, complex scheduling logic — built with enterprise-grade CI/CD and reliability at scale.

projects.title: Private Coach
projects.description: AI-powered cycling coaching SaaS that processes Garmin FIT files, syncs with Intervals.icu via OAuth, and delivers personalised insights via Google Gemini. Interactive GPS maps, CTL/ATL/TSB tracking, 1,000+ structured workouts, AI-generated weekly plans.

projects.title: Imopeksis
projects.description: Full-stack educational platform built as my honours project at Edinburgh Napier — best result and best project in a cohort of 30+. 50+ curated articles with audio streaming, audience segmentation for teachers/parents/coaches, full-text search, and an Express API with a Vue 3 frontend.

projects.title: Procurement AI Analysis
projects.description: Internship under Gareth Williams, Co-Founder of Skyscanner. Analysed government procurement procedures using AI-driven techniques to streamline data collection, categorisation, and synthesis. Delivered clear reports that enhanced stakeholder decision-making.

projects.title: Aquati.co.uk
projects.description: WordPress e-commerce platform built and maintained for Aquati Ltd, a UK water solutions provider. Secure WooCommerce payments, SEO-optimised product pages, fully responsive, cloud hosting. Designed in Figma and delivered end-to-end from branding to deployment.
